tool_purpose: This model is based on a multi-stage text-to-video generation diffusion model, which inputs a description text and returns a video that matches the text description. Only English input is supported. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Text-to-Video Synthesis. API call: DiffusionPipeline.from_pretrained('damo-vilab/text-to-video-ms-1.7b-legacy', torch_dtype=torch.float16).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
